scripts.check: bun run validate && bun run links && bun run a11y
scripts.export: rm -rf .wrangler && mkdir -p .wrangler && mint export --output .wrangler/export.zip && bun scripts/export.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --strict --noUncheckedIndexedAccess --skipLibCheck --target ESNext --module Preserve --moduleResolution bundler --types bun scripts/*.ts
